overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city center. The player moves along elevated walkways and covered plazas with wet reflective surfaces, passing pedestrians and holographic advertisements in a high-density urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon billboards

events.description: pedestrians pass by in opposing direction on the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated sidewalk, passing by neon-lit storefronts and reflective wet pavement

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top and dark pants walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with purple neon text reading WET DREAM and additional advertising graphics
storefronts with glowing green cross symbols and orange neon signage
transparent safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway overlooking lower levels
tall dark towers with illuminated windows and holographic displays rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet elevated walkway at night, dominated by a large purple neon billboard reading WET DREAM on the left. The player walks forward along reflective tiled pavement, passing glass railings on the right while futuristic skyscrapers loom ahead. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposing direction, including one in a white tank top who passes close to the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with glass floor sections

events.description: turns left entering covered walkway with transparent glass floor panels

agents.ego_description: turning left into a darker covered walkway with reflective glass floor panels showing lower city levels

entered.detail: neon sign for EL DIABLO with red lettering mounted on the building wall
transparent glass panels in the walkway revealing illuminated levels below
overhead covering with geometric patterns blocking the sky

segments.scene_description: The player turns left into a covered walkway where the WET DREAM billboard disappears from view. The environment becomes more enclosed with an EL DIABLO neon sign on the left wall and sections of transparent glass flooring revealing lower city levels beneath. The lighting shifts to artificial sources as the sky becomes completely obscured by the roof structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban plaza with distinctive circular ceiling vents

events.description: exits narrow walkway into large covered plaza with circular ceiling structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered plaza toward a brightly lit storefront with red neon signage

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket sitting on bench near illuminated advertising kiosk

entered.detail: large circular ventilation structures with geometric patterns mounted on the plaza ceiling
bright red neon sign reading BRAINWASH above a storefront entrance
tall illuminated display screen with purple neon lighting at its base
large concrete planters containing palm trees lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow glass-floored corridor, the scene opens into a spacious covered plaza featuring distinctive circular ceiling vents overhead. A bright red BRAINWASH neon sign dominates the far wall, while potted palm trees and a digital advertising kiosk with purple lighting occupy the sides. A person in a red jacket sits on a bench near the kiosk as the player moves through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway passing yellow monument structure

events.description: passing large yellow sculptural structure with purple neon base lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past a distinctive golden-yellow architectural monument with cantilevered top

entered.detail: large golden-yellow sculptural column with cantilevered top and purple neon base lighting
billboard advertising JOSEPH BREWING CO with blue neon text and graphics
transparent safety railing along the right edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the plaza into a section featuring a prominent yellow monument structure with purple neon lighting at its base. The BRAINWASH sign and circular ceiling vents disappear from view, replaced by a JOSEPH BREWING CO billboard on the right and glass railings along the walkway edge. The environment remains covered with wet reflective pavement continuing throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending covered walkway with glass railings

events.description: begins descending along sloped walkway with glass railings toward lower street level

agents.ego_description: walking down a sloped pathway with glass railings, moving toward lower street level with increasing visibility of the city below

entered.detail: large wall covered with multiple digital advertisements and neon signage
view of lower city street with vehicles and illuminated storefronts becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player descending along a sloped walkway, with the yellow monument passing out of view behind. Glass railings continue along the right side while the left features a wall of digital billboards. The path leads downward toward a visible street level below, with the camera maintaining a steady descending motion through the neon-lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit urban complex, transitioning from an open elevated walkway into enclosed corridors and finally descending toward the street level. It begins on a wet, reflective walkway dominated by a purple WET DREAM billboard and towering skyscrapers, passing sparse pedestrians under a night sky. As the camera turns left, the environment becomes more enclosed within a covered walkway featuring an EL DIABLO sign and transparent glass flooring that reveals the city levels below. The scene then opens into a spacious plaza characterized by circular ceiling vents and a bright red BRAINWASH sign, before shifting past a yellow monument and a JOSEPH BREWING CO billboard. Finally, the camera moves along a sloped path, passing a wall of digital billboards while descending steadily toward the street level below.
